_description: Maps QA ticket issues to known fixes. Step 3 (/process-qa-report) reads this before analysing tickets. Any ticket matching a known fix is labelled 'VERIFY' rather than 'FIX NOW'. Populated when fixes are completed.
_format: Each entry has: description, finding_group (if applicable), fixed_date, fixed_in (TODO ID or PR), verified_date (date fix was confirmed in a subsequent QA round, or null)

fixes.description: Skip-to-content link misdirection
fixes.notes: Skip link added to base.html, CSS clip-path. Also fixed in Round 2 (QA-FIX1, 2026-02-08) and re-fixed in QA-W27 (2026-02-10).

fixes.description: 404 instead of 403 for restricted pages (notes, cross-programme clients)
fixes.notes: Explicit permission check before queryset filter. Also addressed in Round 7 same-day fix BUG-3 (403 page styling).

fixes.description: Language preference not persisting (French/English mixing)
fixes.notes: UserLanguageMiddleware makes user profile preferred_language authoritative. First fixed in Round 1 (BUG-4, 2026-02-07/08), re-fixed in QA-R7-TIER1. Verified QA-R8-LANG1: 24 tests pass, SafeLocaleMiddleware intact.

fixes.description: htmx syntax errors on create-participant page
fixes.notes: Audited and fixed all hx-* attributes on create-participant template.

fixes.description: Executive nav shows admin items (IMPROVE-3)
fixes.notes: Nav template permission check hides admin links for executives.

fixes.description: Communication quick-log from client profile (BUG-7)
fixes.notes: Added 'Log Communication' to client profile Actions dropdown.

fixes.description: ARIA tablist on client profile tabs
fixes.notes: Arrow key navigation on profile tabs. Different from Actions dropdown ARIA.

fixes.description: Form validation: novalidate + custom errors with aria-describedby
Offline fallback page (service worker)
fixes.notes: Verified QA-R8-UX7: htmx:responseError handler, htmx:sendError handler, offline banner, sw.js, and offline.html all present. No regression.

fixes.description: Group creation pre-selects programme for single-programme users
Executive dashboard date range filter + CSV export
fixes.notes: CSV export added. PDF export is a new request in Round 8.

fixes.description: Individual client data export from client profile
fixes.notes: PDF, CSV, JSON via SecureExportLink with audit trail, nonce dedup, permission gating. Verified QA-R8-VERIFY1: route at /reports/participant/<id>/export/ (reports app), client_export view wired, individual_client export type present.

fixes.description: Secure download link infrastructure (SecureExportLink)
fixes.notes: Single-use, time-limited, audit-trailed download links. Verified QA-R8-VERIFY1: SecureExportLink model present, download/<uuid> route present.

fixes.description: Service episode lifecycle (data model)
fixes.notes: Data model exists. UI may not exist yet — verify.

fixes.description: Login autofocus race condition — credentials leaked into dashboard search bar after redirect
fixes.notes: Removed autofocus from dashboard search input. Login page autofocus on username field is correct and unchanged.

fixes.description: Demo login buttons visible in production — regression test added
fixes.notes: DEMO_MODE env var already defaults to False. Added test_demo_buttons_hidden_when_demo_mode_off to test suite.

fixes.description: Language toggle Tab order before login form (WCAG 2.4.3)
fixes.notes: Moved _lang_toggle.html include from before <main> to after </article> on return visits. First-visit bilingual hero unchanged.

fixes.description: Actions dropdown ARIA keyboard pattern (WCAG 4.1.2) — verified correct
fixes.notes: app.js already implements ArrowDown/Up focus navigation without activation, Escape, Home/End. Stale screenshot.

fixes.description: Form validation data corruption BUG-33 — could not reproduce
fixes.notes: Template uses explicit name= bindings per field. No mechanism for Last Name migrating to Preferred Name. Likely browser autofill artifact or stale screenshot.

fixes.description: /reports/funder/ returning 404 — added permanent redirect to /reports/funder-report/
fixes.notes: RedirectView with permanent=True in reports/urls.py.

fixes.description: Executive dashboard missing date presets and PDF export
fixes.notes: Added date preset buttons (30/90/365 days, fiscal year, custom) and PDF export via WeasyPrint with HTML fallback.

fixes.description: Demo mode safeguards — admin read-only, banner, login UX, audit, data exclusion
fixes.notes: 5 safeguards: demo admin cannot POST to settings views, banner says 'Training Mode', login section labelled 'Training Accounts', demo logins audited with is_demo_context=True, explicit is_demo=False filters on team meeting view and dashboard aggregates.

fixes.description: Consent and custom-field HTMX forms used CSP-breaking inline hx-on autofocus
fixes.notes: Replaced hx-on::load autofocus handlers with a shared app.js helper driven by data-autofocus-first so HTMX swaps no longer trigger EvalError under CSP.

fixes.description: Participant create form lacked inline program validation feedback
fixes.notes: Program checkbox group now shows required marker, inline error text, and aria-describedby wiring when submission omits all programs.
